entity.summary: Australia-origin cryptocurrency exchange and wallet platform established in 2013, with regulated regional operations including a United Kingdom subsidiary registered with the Financial Conduct Authority.
entity.notes: Official CoinJar material establishes the 2013 founding year in Australia. CoinJar UK Limited became FCA-registered as a Cryptoasset Exchange Provider and Custodian Wallet Provider in September 2021; the registration applies to the UK subsidiary and does not replace the Australian origin classification.

expected.summary: Australia-based centralized exchange launched in 2013 and still operating under the CoinJar brand.

changes.summary: Australia-origin cryptocurrency exchange and wallet platform established in 2013, with regulated regional operations including a United Kingdom subsidiary registered with the Financial Conduct Authority.
changes.notes: Official CoinJar material establishes the 2013 founding year in Australia. CoinJar UK Limited became FCA-registered as a Cryptoasset Exchange Provider and Custodian Wallet Provider in September 2021; the registration applies to the UK subsidiary and does not replace the Australian origin classification.

events.title: CoinJar was established in Australia in 2013
events.description: CoinJar was established in Australia in 2013 as a cryptocurrency wallet and exchange platform.
events.notes: The reviewed official sources establish the year but not an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level marker.

events.title: CoinJar UK secured FCA cryptoasset registration
events.description: CoinJar UK Limited was registered by the United Kingdom Financial Conduct Authority as a Cryptoasset Exchange Provider and Custodian Wallet Provider.
events.notes: FCA cryptoasset registration under the money-laundering regulations is not the same as general investment-product authorisation or approval.

evidence.title: About CoinJar
evidence.notes: Official company history describes the establishment of CoinJar in 2013 and its exchange, wallet, and card products.

evidence.title: CoinJar UK platform
evidence.notes: Official UK site states that CoinJar was established as a cryptocurrency exchange in 2013.

evidence.title: CoinJar secures Financial Conduct Authority registration
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous release records CoinJar UK Limited's FCA registration and the covered exchange-provider and custodian-wallet-provider activities.

evidence.title: CoinJar UK terms of service
evidence.notes: Current official terms identify CoinJar UK Limited and state its FCA registration as a Cryptoasset Exchange Provider and Custodian Wallet Provider.

evidence.title: CoinJar official platform
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current CoinJar identity and active regional services.
